description_long: This is an upright piano with a dark, weathered wooden exterior, featuring ornate carved legs and a rectangular top. The front panel above the keyboard is slightly recessed, and a central wooden music stand is mounted above the keys. The keyboard consists of alternating white and black keys, with the white keys showing some wear and discoloration. The piano's surface is marked by visible scratches, stains, and patches of discoloration, giving it a rustic, aged appearance. Three pedals are visible at the base, and the back panel is solid and unadorned. The overall structure is robust, with a heavy, boxy form typical of traditional upright pianos.
description: A dark, weathered upright piano with ornate legs, a worn keyboard, and a central music stand. The wood shows signs of age and use, giving it a rustic character.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard, ornate legs, three pedals, and the central music stand above the keys.
description_view_1: Angled side-front view highlighting the depth of the piano, the side panel details, and the protruding keyboard area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid, unadorned wooden back panel with visible wear and discoloration.
description_view_3: Angled side-rear view showing the thickness of the top and side panels, as well as the back's texture.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard keyboard with approximately 52 white keys and 36 black keys in alternating groups, typical of a full-size upright piano.
